page_content:
Prerequisite: MATH673 and MATH674; or MATH740.

MATH744 Lie Groups | (3 Credits)

An introduction to the fundamentals of Lie groups, including some material on groups of matrices and Lie algebras.

Prerequisite: MATH405, MATH403, MATH411, and MATH432; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
